user.title: GRIB Weather Overlay
user.description: Choose a GRIB data source and enter your API key.

data_description.notification_api_key: Optional: a separate KNMI Notification Service key for instant push updates of new forecast runs. Leave empty to rely on periodic polling.

parameters.title: Choose parameters
parameters.description: Select which weather parameters should be kept up to date and made available to the map card.

error.invalid_auth: The API key was rejected by the source.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the source's API.

abort.already_configured: This source/dataset combination is already configured.

data.retain_runs: Number of forecast runs to keep cached

data_description.notification_api_key: Optional: a separate KNMI Notification Service key for instant push updates. Leave empty to rely on periodic polling.
